title: Two Key Swing Features: Pluggable Look & Feel and the Model-Delegate Architecture
description: This diagram illustrates the core concepts and separation of responsibilities in Swing's two key features, showing how the Look & Feel is decoupled from the component's data model.
relationships: The JComponent holds a reference to both a Model (for state/data) and a UI Delegate (for rendering/input).
The UI Delegate is provided by the current LookAndFeel class, making the appearance 'pluggable'.
The UI Delegate uses the data from the Model to render the component and updates the Model based on user input.
